IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: TO ACQUIRE AND DEVELOP REAL PROPERTY AS AFFORDABLE HOUSING.
IRS990.MissionDesc: TO ACQUIRE AND DEVELOP REAL PROPERTY AS AFFORDABLE HOUSING.
IRS990.Desc: THE ORGANIZATION ACQUIRED AND SOLD PROPERTIES TO MAINTAIN AFFORDABLE HOUSING

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE PREPARATION OF FINANCIAL STATEMENTS IN ACCORDANCE WITH ACCOUNTING PRINCIPLES GENERALLY ACCEPTED IN THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA REQUIRES THE CORPORATION TO REPORT INFORMATION REGARDING ITS EXPOSURE TO VARIOUS TAX POSITIONS TAKEN BY THE CORPORATION. THE CORPORATION HAS DETERMINED WHETHER ANY TAX POSITIONS HAVE MET THE RECOGNITION THRESHOLD AND HAS MEASURED THE CORPORATION'S EXPOSURE TO THOSE TAX POSITIONS. MANAGEMENT BELIEVES THAT THE CORPORATION HAS ADEQUATELY ADDRESSED ALL RELEVANT TAX POSITIONS AND THAT THERE ARE NO UNRECORDED TAX LIABILITIES. FEDERAL AND STATE TAX AUTHORITIES GENERALLY HAVE THE RIGHT TO EXAMINE AND AUDIT THE PREVIOUS THREE YEARS OF TAX RETURNS FILED. ANY INTEREST OR PENALTIES ASSESSED TO THE CORPORATION ARE RECORDED IN OPERATING EXPENSES. NO INTEREST OR PENALTIES FROM FEDERAL OR STATE TAX AUTHORITIES WERE RECORDED IN THE ACCOMPANYING CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: FORM 990 REVIEW PROCESS. AN EXTERNAL TAX PREPARER AND CENTURY AFFORDABLE DEVELOPMENT, INC. STAFF WORK TOGETHER TO GATHER THE INFORMATION NECESSARY TO COMPLETE THE TAX RETURN. STAFF REVIEWS AN INITIAL DRAFT TAX RETURN FROM THE TAX PREPARER AND DISCUSSES ANY ISSUES OR CHANGES. ONCE STAFF IS SATISFIED WITH THE DRAFT TAX RETURN A COPY IS EMAILED TO EACH MEMBER OF THE CENTURY AFFORDABLE DEVELOPMENT, INC. BOARD OF DIRECTORS FOR THEIR REVIEW. ANY QUESTIONS OR REQUESTS FOR COMMENT OR CLARIFICATION FROM THE MEMBERS OF THE BOARD ARE HANDLED BY STAFF OR THE EXTERNAL TAX PREPARER, AND IF NEEDED A FURTHER DRAFT IS PREPARED FOR REVIEW BY STAFF. THE PRESIDENT, SENIOR VICE PRESIDENT, CFO AND THE BOARD MAKE A FINAL REVIEW OF THE TAX RETURN PRIOR TO EXECUTION AND FILING.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: DISCUSSION AND DISCLOSURE AS A PART OF REGULAR BOARD MEETINGS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE PROCESS OF DETERMINING COMPENSATION INCLUDES THE FOLLOWING ELEMENTS: 1. REVIEW AND APPROVAL - THE COMPENSATION OF THE PERSON IS REVIEWED AND APPROVED BY THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS PROVIDED THAT PERSONS WITH CONFLICTS OF INTEREST WITH RESPECT TO THE COMPENSATION ARRANGEMENT AT ISSUE ARE NOT INVOLVED IN THIS REVIEW AND APPROVAL. 2. USE OF DATA AS TO COMPARABLE COMPENSATION - THE COMPENSATION OF THE PERSON IS REVIEWED AND APPROVED USING DATA AS TO COMPARABLE COMPENSATION FOR SIMILARLY QUALIFIED PERSONS IN FUNCTIONALLY COMPARABLE POSITIONS AT SIMILARLY SITUATED ORGANIZATIONS. 3. CONTEMPORANEOUS DOCUMENTATION AND RECORDKEEPING - THERE IS CONTEMPORANEOUS DOCUMENTATION AND RECORDKEEPING WITH RESPECT TO THE DELIBERATIONS AND DECISIONS REGARDING THE COMPENSATION ARRANGEMENT.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION'S GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICTS OF INTEREST POLICY, AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE AVAILABLE UPON REQUEST.
YES, THE ORGANIZATION HAS AN AUDIT COMMITTEE WITH THESE RESPONSIBILITIES. PROCESS IS UNCHANGED FROM PRIOR YEAR.
